landing.heroTitle: See math work in front of you
landing.heroSubtitle: Interactive visual calculators for fractions, integers, multiplication, and division
landing.modesSubtitle: Each mode uses animation to make the concept visible
landing.gamificationTitle: Learn and earn as you go
landing.xpBody: Answer questions correctly and quickly to earn experience points.
landing.streakBody: Come back each day to keep your streak alive.
landing.badgesBody: Reach milestones to earn badges shown on your profile.
landing.ctaBody: Create a free account to save your XP, streaks, and badge history.
landing.guestPrompt: Enjoying this? Track your progress — create a free account

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noBadgesYet: No badges earned yet — complete a quiz to start!

leaderboard.title: Weekly leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top players by XP earned this week
leaderboard.empty: No scores yet this week — be the first!

quiz.question: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.guestPrompt: Create an account to save your score and track progress

fractions.label: Pizza Fractions
fractions.description: Add and subtract fractions using pizza slices
fractions.step0: Here are your two fractions: {a}/{b} and {c}/{d}
fractions.step1: These pizzas have different slice counts — let's fix that
fractions.step3: Now both have {lcd} slices — ready to combine

negative.label: Number Line
negative.description: Learn positive and negative jumps on a number line
negative.step0: Starting at {a} on the number line

multiplication.label: Area Grid
multiplication.description: See multiplication as filling a rectangular area
multiplication.step1: Filling row by row — {filled} of {total} squares

division.label: Fair Share
division.description: Split a group of items equally into boxes
division.step0: We have {total} items to share between {groups} groups
